column1: Where is the adult now in relation to the person alleged to have caused harm?
Is the adult in immediate danger of further abuse?

Please describe
Patient states that his husband is not abusive when visiting
Has the adult taken any necessary steps or actions to try to address the abuse or neglect? If so, please explain
Have any immediate actions been identified to reduce the potential for further abuse?

Please describe
Patient has agreed to a referral to Harbour Support Services
Are there any other people (including children) who may be at risk of harm?
If Yes, please describe the risk that remains and the names of others potentially at risk
